comments.author: TonyLinog
comments.body: I dont know what formal equivalence means but I was gonna ask for a translation of these that i could pray with Abie. Is one of those already on github or will this work?

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
אָנֹכִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ אֲשֶׁר הוֹצֵאתִיךָ מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרַיִם מִבֵּית עֲבָדִים׃ לֹא יִהְיֶה־לְךָ אֱלֹהִים אֲחֵרִים עַל־פָּנַָי

I am Yahweh the god of you
I am Yahweh your God

The one who exited you from the land of Egypt 
Who brought you out from that land Egypt 

Out of that house of slavery 
Out of that house of enslavement

Not there will be for you
You will not possess
You cannot have for yourselves
You cannot have in your possession
You cannot place or install for yourselves

Other gods on my face
Other gods before me
Other gods sharing the local space I occupy with you


### figurative / dynamic
- it's me Yahweh, I'm your only God!  I brought of that place, the house of slaves. don't bring it with you where we're going together.  Don't carry any other gods so you can put them on my face and in my place
